prompt: Create a vertical full-body lifestyle fashion photograph of a stylish young Indian woman with fair warm skin tone standing in a bright sunflower field during golden hour. She has long dark black hair worn loose and flowing in the breeze, with her face intentionally anonymized by a soft square skin-toned blur covering the entire facial area. She is posed casually on a narrow dirt path among tall sunflowers, body angled slightly to the side, one arm extended gently outward and the other hand holding a plain white takeaway coffee cup. Her outfit has exactly 7 visible fashion/accessory elements: a fitted white spaghetti-strap cami top, a high-waisted navy blue midi skirt with large white floral print, white open-toe block-heel mule sandals, a beige crocheted shoulder tote bag, gold jhumka-style earrings, a delicate gold necklace, and a small bracelet. The field should be dense with many yellow sunflowers at different depths, including large blurred sunflowers in the foreground, sharper midground flowers around her, and soft green trees in the distant background. Use warm natural sunlight from behind and the side, soft bokeh, shallow depth of field, realistic skin and fabric textures, airy summer mood, elegant candid editorial style, 2:3 vertical composition, no text, no watermark.
